added.description: Hayley makes Jeff get a friend to add some mystery to their relationship but gets more mystery than she bargained for. Francine attempts to grow the world's longest fingernails.
added.title: A Little Mystery

added.description: When Stan discovers anonymous love letters written to Francine, he worries that this secret admirer could threaten their relationship.
added.title: Better on Paper

added.description: The judgmental voice in Hayley's head makes it impossible for her to enjoy a girls' night with Nerfer and Danuta.
added.title: Cow I Met Your Moo-ther

added.description: The Smiths get new neighbors! Meanwhile, Roger dreads having to be a little boy's kite for a day.
added.title: Don't You Be My Neighbor

added.description: When Stan goes too far to keep his work friend away from Francine, she is forced to save her new "little" friend.
added.title: Frantastic Voyage

added.description: Roger (Seth MacFarlane) announces that "Max Jets," a character of Roger's who enjoys showering the Smith family with money, is soon getting out of prison. But a wrench is thrown in the system when Max falls in love with Gina (Michelle Monaghan), a gold-digging waitress who threatens the family's inheritance.
added.title: Max Jets

added.description: In an attempt to maintain his "prime," Stan explores some cosmetic solutions that could not go worse.
added.title: Saving Face

added.description: Francine insists that Steve let her help with his school project, Stan finally fixes that shingle, and the rest of the family goes on a quest to return Gallagher's mallet.
added.title: Stan Fixes a Shingle

added.description: When Jeff finds out that the family thinks he makes terrible decisions, he decides to take a job selling stretchy leggings to prove them wrong.
added.title: Stretched Thin

added.description: Klaus and Jeff's friendship is threatened by Klaus's girlfriend from another realm.
added.title: The Pleasanting at Smith House

added.description: Steve and Principal Lewis get caught in a dangerous situation at the school; the rest of the family makes an adorable new friend.
added.title: Viced Principal

added.description: Linda almost totally accidentally kidnaps a children's book author.
added.title: Mother Author Laser Pointer
